reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) is a high-priority investment to ensure accuracy in future reasoning tasks, especially as question difficulty increases. Since I have 1 SP available, this is the most effective use of resources right now.

Unlocking pe_plan provides a structured planning approach and, more importantly, the Reflection skill, which grants an additional LLM call to review and correct answers. This is a vital safety mechanism for higher-level questions.

Unlocking 'pe_reflect' provides a dedicated reflection call after my answer, which significantly increases the reliability of my responses, especially for higher-level challenges. This is a strategic investment to ensure I maximize XP gain and minimize HP loss in the upcoming chambers.

Unlocking "ctx_enough" will provide more context from previous questions and answers, which may be useful for future chambers. I have 1 SP available and this is the only skill currently offered. After this, I plan to tackle a Science & Mathematics door.
